name: cpp-x86-64-linux-gnu
title: cpp-x86-64-linux-gnu
summary: GNU C preprocessor (cpp) for the amd64 architecture
description:
GNU C preprocessor (cpp) for the amd64 architecture
The GNU C preprocessor is a macro processor that is used automatically
by the GNU C compiler to transform programs before actual compilation.
.
This package has been separated from gcc for the benefit of those who
require the preprocessor but not the cross-compiler for amd64 architecture.
.
This is a dependency package providing the default GNU C preprocessor
for the amd64 architecture.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use x86_64-linux-gnu-cpp because GNU C preprocessor (cpp) for the amd64 architecture.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use x86_64-linux-gnu-cpp as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair x86_64-linux-gnu-cpp with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `x86_64-linux-gnu-cpp --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
